message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 40
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor SalesClerk

participant "«presentation»\nDefineNewCategoryUI" as UI
participant "«application»\nDefineNewCategoryController" as C
participant "«builder»\nCategoryBuilder" as B
participant "«domain»\ncategory:Category" as Cat
database "«repository»\nCategoryRepository" as R

SalesClerk -> UI : 1 Define new category
activate UI

UI -> C : 2 create

UI -> SalesClerk : 3 asks user information
SalesClerk -> UI : 4 Code, Description

UI -> C : 5 addCategory(categoryCode, categoryDescription)
activate C

C -> B : 6 create
activate B

C -> B : 7 withCode(code)
C -> B : 8 withDescription(description)

B -> Cat : 9 create(categoryCode, categoryDescription)
activate Cat
Cat --> B : 10 category
deactivate Cat

B --> C : 11 category
deactivate B

C -> R : 12 category()
R --> C : 13 categoryRepository
C -> R : 14 save(category)

C --> UI : 15 category
deactivate C

UI -> SalesClerk : 16 displayCategoryInfo
deactivate UI
@enduml
